subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! Your letter was received, but due to lack of opportunity the reply was delayed. Yet you [are in the box...] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان نامه شما رسید ولی از عدم فرصت جواب تاخیر افتاد ولی شما در جعبه
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @business; financial; property matters, @personal instructions
